article.body_preview:
DHAKA, July 19, 2023 (BSS) - Two companies, with a total investment of around US$42 million, signed land allotment agreements with Bangladesh Economic Zones Authority (BEZA) to build factories in the Bangabandhu Sheikh Mujib Shilpa Nagar (BSMSN) for manufacturing ceramics and textile chemicals.

The companies are X Ceramics Limited ?and Dysin Advanced Materials Limited. They will set up their factories on 30 acres of land.

BEZA Executive Member (Investment Development) Md Mozibor Rahman, Managi

llm_connections.evidence_quote: signed land allotment agreements with Bangladesh Economic Zones Authority (BEZA) to build factories in the Bangabandhu Sheikh Mujib Shilpa Nagar (BSMSN) for manufacturing ceramics and textile chemicals.
llm_connections.scope_justification: The article explicitly names the items to be produced—'ceramics and textile chemicals'—which directly matches the Product feature's scope of specific commercial items.

llm_connections.evidence_quote: Those to whom we have allotted space have built their factory buildings. Many companies have gone into production.
llm_connections.scope_justification: The article reports that firms have 'gone into production', directly describing commencement of manufacturing activity, which matches the Production feature's scope of factory manufacturing activity.
